scripts.format: oxfmt frontend e2e && dotnet format Fmis.slnx
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check frontend e2e && dotnet format Fmis.slnx --verify-no-changes
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.test: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:contract
